description: Updating balances without source events destroys auditability.
body: Use ledger/event source. Use when a proposed approach skips money movement, ledger entries, reconciliation output, idempotency keys, audit trails, and approval records or claims success without domain evidence. Do not use this dossier as a positive implementation strategy; it is a do-not-use signal. Actions: block the shortcut, name the missing evidence, and switch to a safer methodology or ask for human approval. Validation signals include absence or contradiction in decimal precision tests, duplicate-submit tests, reconciliation reports, immutable audit evidence, and human approval notes. Risk boundary: treat repeated recurrence as a blocker when it can cause silent balance changes, floating-point money, missing audit trails, regulatory ambiguity, and irreversible financial state.
